(ParticleFieldKernelBaseAPI)=
# ParticleFieldKernelBaseAPI

Defines a base applied schema for ParticleField
kernel data. The ParticleField kernel defines the spatial basis function for 
every particle.

This is a base schema that ParticleField characteristics schemas typically will
have as a built-in applied schema. This allows validation to verify that an 
applied schema that defines kernel data is always present for a ParticleField.
